description: Use this API to export an image of the active Slider Diagram in the GUI to a file. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.3.0. exportimagefile_2(type, imagefile, quality, width, height, scale, x, y)
python_syntax: exportimagefile_2(type, imagefile, quality, width, height, scale, x, y)

parameters.name: imagefile
parameters.description: Name of the image file to be written. (input).

parameters.name: quality
parameters.description: A value, between 1 and 100, used to control the quality of the exported image if type = 2. (input).

parameters.name: width
parameters.description: Width of the image to capture in pixels. (input).

parameters.name: height
parameters.description: Height of the image to capture in pixels. (input).

parameters.name: scale
parameters.description: Scale at wich to capture the image. (input).

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: X location on the diagram that will be the center of the image. (input).

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: Y location on the diagram that will be the center of the image. (input).
